GT builder for stratified wide tables (3 cols per stratum)

Source: R/builders-gt.R
dot-build_gt_strata_wide_uni.Rd

GT builder for stratified wide tables (3 cols per stratum)

Usage

.build_gt_strata_wide_uni(df, spanners, effect_label, theme, footnotes)

Developed by Rubeshkumar Polani, Salin K Eliyas, Manikandanesan Sakthivel, Yuvaraj Krishnamoorthy, Marie Gilbert Majella.
